prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021-2025年上海市综合类最低录取位次分别为5356名、5551名、5664名、6631名、4823名。2021-2024年位次整体呈后移趋势（从5356名后移至6631名），但202 5年因选科要求统一调整为"物理、化学(2科必选)"，位次大幅前移至4823名，较2024年前移约1808名，反映出选科改革后生源结构变化显著。2025年位次4823名作为新选科模式下 的基准位次；该校在上海市2021-2025年招生计划分别为19人、20人、20人、18人、18人；2026年招生计划为18人，与2025年持平。计划未扩招，无 稀释效应，竞争压力完全由考生规模变化决定。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 重庆大学是教育部直属的985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第34名，近年排名稳定 在33-34名区间，属于全国顶尖高校行列。工科实力突出，尤其在电气、机械、土木等领域具有传统优势；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，主要因实验室爆 炸事故（1死3伤）引发校园安全关注，可能对部分考生报考心理产生轻微抑制。抖音综合热度排名第23位（较热），短视频平台曝光量尚可，关注度处于中上水平；第五轮学科评估中，土木工程获评A+（全国顶尖），机械工程、电气工程、环境科学与工程、风景园林学获评A-。电气工程、计算机等工科专业与2026年招生计划中的工科试 验班（卓越计划、计算机与智能软件、未来信息等）高度对应，对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年招生专业全部为工科试验班/理科试验班大类，涵盖电 气工程、计算机、人工智能、数据科学等当前社会高热方向，专业吸引力强。上海市2026年考生总数约66,700人，较2025年的49,276人增加约35.4%，考生规模大幅增长，竞争显 著加剧。；重庆大学位于重庆市，非上海本地高校，上海考生报考时存在一定地域偏好差异。该校在沪招生计划仅18人，占比较小 ，属于外埠985在沪招生的典型规模。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年选科改革后的基准位次4823名、2026年招生计划持平、上海市考生总数大幅增长约35.4%导致竞争加剧、专业热 度较高但声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次将较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约4743名，区间4243-5243名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越计划）
- 电气工程及其自动化
- 工科试验班（计算机与智能软件）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（未来信息）
- 工科试验班（智能汽车领航班）
- 理科试验班（数理基础）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（高端装备与智能制造）
- 工科试验班（智慧能源与先进材料）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4243-5243名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（4243名以内）可重点冲刺一档的卓越计划或电气工程；位 次接近区间上限（5243名附近）建议以三档专业为主，争取录取。所有专业均要求物理、化学选科，请确认选科符合要求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Shanghai Comprehensive category were 5356, 5551, 5664, 6631, and 4823 respectively. From 2021 to 2024, the rankings showed an overall backward trend (moving from 5356 to 6631), but in 2025, due to the adjustment of subject requirements to "Physics, Chemistry (2 subjects required)", the ranking significantly advanced to 4823, moving forward by about 1808 places compared to 2024, reflecting significant changes in student source structure after the subject selection reform. The 2025 ranking of 4823 serves as the baseline ranking under the new subject selection model. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai from 2021 to 2025 was 19, 20, 20, 18, and 18 students respectively; the 2026 enrollment plan is 18 students, unchanged from 2025. The plan has not expanded, with no dilution effect, and competition pressure is entirely determined by changes in the number of candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Chongqing University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university directly under the Ministry of Education. It ranks 34th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking in the 33-34 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of national universities. Its engineering strength is outstanding, especially in fields such as electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and civil engineering, where it has traditional advantages. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to a laboratory explosion accident (1 death, 3 injuries) that raised campus safety concerns, which may mildly suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 23rd (relatively hot), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and above-average attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, civil engineering was rated A+ (top in the country), while mechanical engineering, electrical engineering, environmental science and engineering, and landscape architecture were rated A-. Engineering majors such as electrical engineering and computer science closely correspond to the engineering experimental classes (Excellence Plan, Computer and Intelligent Software, Future Information, etc.) in the 2026 enrollment plan, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: All majors in the 2026 enrollment plan are engineering experimental classes/science experimental classes, covering high-demand fields such as electrical engineering, computer science, artificial intelligence, and data science, with strong major appeal. The total number of candidates in Shanghai in 2026 is approximately 66,700, an increase of about 35.4% compared to 49,276 in 2025, representing a significant growth in candidate numbers and intensified competition. Chongqing University is located in Chongqing, not a local university in Shanghai, so there are certain regional preference differences when Shanghai candidates apply. The university's enrollment plan in Shanghai is only 18 students, a relatively small proportion, typical of the scale of out-of-province 985 universities recruiting in Shanghai.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the baseline ranking of 4823 after the 2025 subject selection reform, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 35.4% in the total number of Shanghai candidates leading to intensified competition, high major popularity but slightly negative reputation, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly advance compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4743, with a range of 4243-5243.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Plan)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computer and Intelligent Software).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Vehicle Leading Class)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Physics Foundation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (High-End Equipment and Intelligent Manufacturing)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Energy and Advanced Materials).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4243-5243, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, use Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4243), you can focus on stretching for Tier 1 majors like the Excellence Plan or Electrical Engineering; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 5243), it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 3 majors to secure admission. All majors require Physics and Chemistry subject selection; please confirm that your subject selection meets the requirements.
